facebook.content:
"But you are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, God's special possession, that you may declare the praises of him who called you out of darkness into his wonderful light."

1 Peter 2:9

As we walk in the light of Christ, it's imperative that we recognize our identity - we are not just citizens of a nation, but citizens of the Kingdom of God. As a royal priesthood, we possess authority to declare the praises of our King, to bring glory to His name in every sphere of life.

instagram.content:
"For the kingdom of God is not a matter of talk, but of power."
1 Corinthians 4:20

The Kingdom is not about grand gestures, but about the supernatural authority of Jesus over every area of our lives. We must submit to Him in every sphere, or we risk being driven by the void. It's time to yield to the King's power, not just His presence.

tiktok.content:
"Jesus said, 'I tell you the truth, the Son can do nothing by Himself. He can only do what He sees His Father doing.'" - John 5:19

In the Kingdom, authority is not about personal power, but about surrendered obedience to the Father's will.
